summary: Steady refactoring session — Claude rewired the data pipeline, Copilot kept the diffs clean.
Mid-week architecture review with Claude; heavier Copilot usage pushing a new feature branch.
Lighter day — bug triage and documentation, ChatGPT helped draft some research notes.
Busy Friday sprint: shipped a PR with Devin, Copilot coverage high across both stacks.
Weekend side project — personal coding and ChatGPT for UX brainstorming.
Slow Sunday. ChatGPT for creative writing, light Claude session for personal automation.
Back at it Monday. Claude drove design decisions, Copilot Work picked up where Friday left off.
Strong Tuesday — complex query optimization with Claude, Devin queued background tasks.
Mid-week maintenance: bug fixes, code review, and some Teams meeting summaries.
Heavy day — Claude-driven platform migration spike, Copilot at max throughput.
End-of-week consolidation: merged three PRs, Devin ran integration tests autonomously.
Personal project day: ChatGPT for creative content, Claude for a side automation script.
Light Sunday. ChatGPT for brainstorming, mostly personal reading and ideation.
New sprint kickoff — architecture session with Claude, M365 Copilot prepped the roadmap doc.
Peak sprint day: deep refactor of the analytics core with Claude and Copilot at full clip.
Mid-sprint high velocity — feature work, code reviews, and a keynote doc with M365 Copilot.
Sprint review prep: Claude helped draft the retrospective, Devin ran automated benchmarks.
Strong finish — demo prep, final PR merges, Devin triggered end-to-end test suite.
Weekend catch-up: some ChatGPT research and a light Claude coding session.
Rest day with light ChatGPT use for personal research and planning.
New week, new scope: Claude set up project scaffolding, Copilot Work generating boilerplate.
Rising tempo — feature velocity increasing, M365 Copilot heavy for stakeholder updates.
Cross-team alignment day: lots of M365 Copilot for docs and Teams, Claude for tech specs.
High-intensity coding push — Claude and Copilot both at monthly peaks, Devin delegation up.
Solid delivery Friday: shipped the platform feature, Devin ran CI/CD flows autonomously.
Weekend deep-dive: personal project sprint with ChatGPT for ideation and Claude for execution.
Creative Sunday — ChatGPT for writing, light Copilot session, some personal automation planning.
Start of high-output week — Claude architecture push, all work tools firing at once.
Second-busiest day ever — major refactor with Claude, Copilot at max, Devin multi-tasking.
Today: deep coding sprint across personal and work stacks; Pulse Log implementation in full swing.
